title: Rhythm: news flow paragraph
description: Multi-sentence news paragraph — sustained 80 WPM rhythm
text: Reports from Tokyo on Thursday confirmed the launch of a new high-speed rail line connecting three major cities. The project, which took six years and cost over forty billion yen, is expected to cut commute times by nearly half. Officials say the route will carry up to ninety thousand passengers daily.

tips.text: Long news paragraph at 80 WPM = real newsroom speed
Names and places break flow — practice their entry rhythm

tips.target: Reports from Tokyo on Thursday confirmed the launch of a new high-speed rail line connecting three major cities. The project, which took six years and

tips.text: Metronome at 80 BPM — sustain it across all sentences

tips.target: cost over forty billion yen, is expected to cut commute times by nearly half. Officials say the route will carry up to ninety thousand passengers daily.

character_tips.anna: Newsroom speed at 80 WPM. This is where journalists live.
character_tips.maxim: 80 WPM sustained is what professional writers hit.
character_tips.knopych: WIRE SERVICE SPEED! 📰 Get the scoop!
character_tips.klavochka: Telling the world's story with grace, my sunshine ☀️
